product_information.product_name: Earth Line Vitamine E Dag & Nachtcrème 50 ML
product_information.description: Vitamine E dag- en nachtcrème met zuivere oliën en kruidenextracten beschermt en verzorgt de huid op natuurlijke wijze. Stimuleert de celvernieuwing, houdt het vochtgehalte op peil en helpt bij rimpels en littekens.

inferred_information.raw_ingredients: Aqua (Water), Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter**, Cetearyl Alcohol, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil**, Macadamia Integrifolia Seed Oil**, Glycerin, Glyceryl Stearate, Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil**, Cetyl Palmitate, Sodium Cetearyl Sulfate, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Oil**, Alcohol, Betaine, Persea Gratissima Oil**, Parfum (Fragrance), Cetyl Alcohol, Levulinic Acid, P-Anisic Acid, Titanium Dioxide, Sodium Levulinate, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Tocopherol, Porphyra Umbilicalis Extract, Algin, Phytic Acid, Symphytum Officinale Root Extract**, Calendula Officinalis Flower Extract**, Hamamelis Virginiana Bark/Leaf Extract**, Plantago Major Leaf Extract**, Disodium Cocoyl Glutamate, Sodium Cocoyl Glutamate, Salix Alba Bark Extract**, Xanthan Gum, Aluminum Hydroxide, Sodium Benzoate, Sodium Lactate, Potassium Sorbate, Lavandula Hybrida Grosso Herb Oil, Lactic Acid, Benzyl Benzoate*, Citral*, Citronellol*, Geraniol*, Limonene*, Linalool*. * from natural essential oils ** from controlled organic agriculture
inferred_information.product_type: Jonge huid, Oudere huid, Droge huid, Vette huid
